subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from the presence of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, there is no God but Him; His is the creation and the command, and all shall return unto Him. Glorified be He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم انه ما من اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر و کل الیه راجعون سبحان الذی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
